2604.05418.title: VideoStir: Understanding Long Videos via Spatio-Temporally Structured and Intent-Aware RAG
2604.05418.paper_summary: Scaling multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to long videos is constrained by limited context windows. While retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is a promising remedy by organizing query-relevant visual evidence into a compact context, most existing methods (i) flatten videos into independent segments, breaking their inherent spatio-temporal structure, and (ii) depend on explicit semantic matching, which can miss cues that are implicitly relevant to the query's intent. To overcome these limitations, we propose VideoStir, a structured and intent-aware long-video RAG framework. It firstly structures a video as a spatio-temporal graph at clip level, and then performs multi-hop retrieval to aggregate evidence across distant yet contextually related events. Furthermore, it introduces an MLLM-backed intent-relevance scorer that retrieves frames based on their alignment with the query's reasoning intent. To support this capability, we curate IR-600K, a large-scale dataset tailored for learning frame-query intent alignment. Experiments show that VideoStir is competitive with state-of-the-art baselines without relying on auxiliary information, highlighting the promise of shifting long-video RAG from flattened semantic matching to structured, intent-aware reasoning. Codes and checkpoints are available at Github.
2604.05418.paper_summary_zh: 將多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）擴展到長視頻受到有限上下文窗口的限制。雖然檢索增強生成（RAG）通過將與查詢相關的視覺證據組織成緊湊的上下文是一個有前景的解決方案，但大多數現有方法（i）將視頻壓平為獨立的片段，破壞了其固有的時空結構，以及（ii）依賴於明確的語義匹配，這可能會錯過與查詢意圖隱含相關的線索。為了克服這些限制，我們提出了VideoStir，一個結構化和意圖感知的長視頻RAG框架。它首先將視頻結構化為片段層級的時空圖，然後進行多跳檢索，以聚合跨越遙遠但上下文相關事件的證據。此外，它引入了一個基於MLLM的意圖相關性評分器，根據幀與查詢推理意圖的對齊程度來檢索幀。為了支持這一能力，我們策劃了IR-600K，一個大型數據集，專門用於學習幀-查詢意圖對齊。實驗表明，VideoStir在不依賴輔助信息的情況下與最先進的基準相當，突顯了將長視頻RAG從壓平的語義匹配轉向結構化、意圖感知推理的潛力。代碼和檢查點可在Github上獲得。
2604.05418.author: Honghao Fu et.al.
2604.05418.authors: Honghao Fu, Miao Xu, Yiwei Wang, Dailing Zhang, Liu Jun, Yujun Cai
